title: Sophisticated Storage in Motion
description: A Sophisticated Storage add on which allows using storage blocks with minecarts and in the future with other entities
body:
Sophisticated Storage in Motion brings the customization and functionality of Sophisticated Storage to minecarts and boats! 
This addon mod allows you to use sophisticated barrels, chests, and shulker boxes as storage options with minecarts and boats, offering the perfect blend of mobility and advanced storage solutions. 

![Sophisticated Storage in Motion minecarts](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e5c3a81f-0129-4c26-a375-1b6694f35bd5)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/810643286511190016?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&labelColor=FFFFFF&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/ZNxRYScDS7)    [![Twitter Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P3pp3rf1y-FFFFFF?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=000000&label=Twitter&labelColor=FFFFFF&color=202020)](https://x.com/P3pp3rF1y)    [![GitHub Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P3pp3rf1y-FFFFFF?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=000000&label=GitHub&labelColor=FFFFFF&color=202020)](https://github.com/P3pp3rF1y)    [![Ko-Fi Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P3pp3rf1y-FFFFFF?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&label=Ko-Fi&labelColor=FFFFFF&color=202020)](https://ko-fi.com/p3pp3rf1y)
### Vehicles
All storage blocks from Sophisticated Storage can be crafted with a minecart or boat. Additionally, all variants of vanilla boats can be used in these recipes, with the resulting block retaining the boat's type.

### Upgrades 
All of the Storage Upgrades work in the vehicle storages, the ones that need position for their logic use the position of minecart / boat. Upgrades can be added to vehicle storage by right clicking them directly in the world.

### Tier upgrades
Storage tier upgrades can be used directly on vehicles to upgrade their storage to one of the higher tiers. In addition to that vehicle items can be upgraded in crafting table similar to how storages can be upgraded. And recipes are shown in JEI

### Storage Tool
Storage tool can be used directly in world on vehicles to lock storage on them and change the visibility of different parts of the storage (locks, tiers, 
upgrades and for limited barrels counts and fill levels)

### Paintbrush / Decoration table
Paintbrush can paint the storages on vehicles with the same level of support as it can regular storages so both tints as well as barrel materials changing with paintbrush are supported. In addition to this vehicles can be put in decoration table and changed directly in there.
